$notes.mutual_exclusion: icebergCompatV1 and icebergCompatV2 are mutually exclusive. V2 explicitly requires that V1 is not active (feature absent or property not true). icebergCompatV3-preview additionally requires that both V1 and V2 are not active.
$notes.v3_preview_rfc: icebergCompatV3 is an RFC-stage feature (protocol_rfcs/iceberg-compat-v3.md) not yet ratified in PROTOCOL.md. Cases use the feature name icebergCompatV3-preview per the pre-ratification naming convention. RFC requirements: CM name or id mode, Row Tracking enabled on the table, ICv1 and ICv2 not active. Unlike ICv1 and ICv2, DV is explicitly permitted to be both supported and active under ICv3.

cases.name: iceberg_v3_preview_create_table_2_7_feature_listed_property_true_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,domainMetadata,rowTracking,icebergCompatV3-preview] table with columnMapping mode=name, delta.enableIcebergCompatV3=true, and row tracking enabled succeeds.

cases.name: iceberg_v3_preview_supported_not_active_create_table_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,domainMetadata,rowTracking,icebergCompatV3-preview] table without delta.enableIcebergCompatV3=true succeeds; icebergCompatV3-preview writer requirements only apply when the feature is active.

cases.name: iceberg_v3_preview_create_table_2_7_with_deletion_vectors_active_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,domainMetadata,rowTracking,icebergCompatV3-preview,deletionVectors] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV3=true and delta.enableDeletionVectors=true succeeds; unlike ICv1 and ICv2, ICv3 explicitly permits deletion vectors to be both supported and active.

cases.name: iceberg_v3_preview_create_table_2_7_missing_column_mapping_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[domainMetadata,rowTracking,icebergCompatV3-preview] table without columnMapping in writerFeatures and delta.enableIcebergCompatV3=true fails; the RFC requires columnMapping to be co-listed.

cases.name: iceberg_v3_preview_create_table_2_7_column_mapping_not_active_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,domainMetadata,rowTracking,icebergCompatV3-preview] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV3=true but no columnMapping mode set fails; the RFC requires columnMapping to be active in name or id mode when ICv3 is active.

cases.name: iceberg_v3_preview_create_table_2_7_row_tracking_not_enabled_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,domainMetadata,rowTracking,icebergCompatV3-preview] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV3=true but without delta.enableRowTracking=true fails; the RFC requires Row Tracking to be enabled when ICv3 is active.

cases.name: iceberg_v3_preview_and_v2_create_table_both_active_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with both delta.enableIcebergCompatV2=true and delta.enableIcebergCompatV3=true fails; the RFC requires ICv2 to not be active when ICv3 is active.

cases.name: iceberg_v3_preview_and_v1_create_table_both_active_fails
cases.description: Creating a table with both delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true and delta.enableIcebergCompatV3=true fails; the RFC requires ICv1 to not be active when ICv3 is active.
